---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible bug or unexpected behaviour
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages or unexpected output.

## Stack trace (if applicable)

```
Paste the full stack trace here.
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Laravel Vitals version | e.g. `v1.0.0-alpha.30` |
| PHP version | e.g. `8.3.4` |
| Laravel version | e.g. `12.x` |
| Livewire version | e.g. `3.x` |
| Flux version | e.g. `2.x` |
| Database driver | e.g. `sqlite`, `mysql`, `pgsql` |
| Lighthouse driver | e.g. `local`, `pagespeed`, `playwright` |
| OS | e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 22.04 |

## Additional context

Any other information that might help (config values, screenshots, etc.).
